title: Spandam’s Frame-Up
description: The story turns back to Tom, Iceburg, and Franky, showing the pride and dream behind the Sea Train.
scene: Across pages 23, this part follows Franky, Paulie, Tom, Iceburg, Spandam. The story turns back to Tom, Iceburg, and Franky, showing the pride and dream behind the Sea Train.
